description: P1 feature set — 23 technical and statistical indicator features for OHLCV bar data.
notes: v2 supersedes v1 (feature_schema_v1.json) for the P1 model family.
v1 (5 synthetic features) is retained for the current production model.
Both Python and TypeScript implementations use identical formulas to avoid training-inference skew.
Minimum 65 bars required so all warmup windows (Hurst=60, MACD slow=26, KAMA window=10+5) are satisfied with margin.
Day-of-week features use UTC date from barCloseTimeUtc; Monday=0, Friday=4.
